nasb.text: Your descendants will also be like the dust of the earth, and you will spread out to the west and to the east and to the north and to the south; and in you and in your descendants shall all the families of the earth be blessed.

esv.text: Your offspring shall be like the dust of the earth, and you shall spread abroad to the west and to the east and to the north and to the south, and in you and your offspring shall all the families of the earth be blessed.

cnv.text: 你的後裔必像地面的灰塵那麼多；你必向東、南、西、北擴展；地上的萬族必因你和你的後裔得福。

ccb.text: 你的后代必多如地上的尘沙，遍布四方，地上万族必因你和你的后代而蒙福。

csbs.text: 你的后裔必如同地上的尘土；你必向东南西北扩展；地上万族都必因你和你的后裔而蒙福。
